profit_claim: No profit claim. Current evidence blocks scaling.
blockers: Broker-vs-paired reconciliation breach remains open ($2335.00 delta)
ML priors are stale: 85.15% expected vs 16.76% realized

protocol_violations: Trade 3: entry was backfilled after blind hold path

vix.guidance: VIX 15-20: Standard conditions. 15-delta iron condors at 30-45 DTE optimal. $10-wide wings should collect $1.50-2.50 per contract.

market_research.trade_implication: Regime data is advisory only. It cannot override negative expectancy, reconciliation breaches, stale ML priors, or validation protocol violations.

rag.query: SPY iron condor negative expectancy stale priors reconciliation breach trade gate

loss_clusters.label: 10-wide or wider wings
loss_clusters.recommendation: Quarantine 10-wide SPY iron condors; test narrower defined-risk structures or explicitly prove better width/risk math before re-entry.

loss_clusters.label: More than one contract
loss_clusters.recommendation: Limit validation to one contract until the changed-rule cohort clears positive expectancy, profit factor, and realized-P/L gates.

loss_clusters.label: Held 7 days or longer
loss_clusters.recommendation: Add an exit/repair rule for slow-moving losers before allowing long-hold IC exposure again.

loss_clusters.label: Closed in under 24 hours
loss_clusters.recommendation: Require the next validation hypothesis to prove why holding-time behavior changed before allowing another short-dated IC cohort.

loss_clusters.label: Closed in under 1 hour
loss_clusters.recommendation: Do not open setups whose expected management requires intraday repair; enforce a minimum hold unless a hard max-loss or broken-leg condition fires.

research_references.title: Cboe S&P 500 Iron Condor Index methodology
research_references.takeaway: Cboe's CNDR benchmark is a mechanical monthly SPX iron condor with roughly 20-delta short legs and 5-delta long wings; it is a benchmark, not proof that this repo's current rule set has positive expectancy.

research_references.title: Cboe strategy benchmark indices
research_references.takeaway: Cboe publishes option-writing benchmarks, which makes CNDR a useful baseline for comparing systematic option-selling performance.

research_references.title: Machine Learning for Volatility Trading
research_references.takeaway: Short-volatility P/L should be conditioned on volatility risk premium, realized volatility, and convexity loss, not only entry delta.

research_references.title: Historical analysis of iron condors on SPX and VIX
research_references.takeaway: Historical SPX/VIX analysis reports that iron-condor outcomes vary materially by market and volatility conditions; regime filters should be tested before scaling.

research_references.title: Alpaca iron condor options API guide
research_references.takeaway: Alpaca supports API-driven options workflows; broker execution health and protection orders still need local verification before any entry.

next_hypotheses.test: Backtest and paper-validate IC entries only when VIX/IV regime shows positive volatility-risk-premium evidence.
next_hypotheses.kill_criteria: Stop if 30-trade cohort expectancy <= 0, profit factor <= 1.0, or reconciliation alert fires.

next_hypotheses.test: Compare 5-wide one-lot structures against historical 10-wide and multi-contract loss clusters.
next_hypotheses.kill_criteria: Reject if drawdown or expectancy is worse than current validation baseline.

next_hypotheses.test: Require a RAG retrieval packet with loss clusters, reconciliation status, and current research-state regime before every entry.
next_hypotheses.kill_criteria: No entry when RAG returns unresolved negative-expectancy or blind-hold lessons.
